title: Boat Rental in Zakynthos: Costs, Seasons and Tips 2026
html:
Boat rental in Zakynthos reaches Navagio Beach and the Blue Caves from Zakynthos Town port, with a self-drive day on a small motorboat from around EUR 120 and crewed yachts climbing far higher. BoatHire24 lists verified boats across the island so you can compare prices first.

Where to set off in Zakynthos

Most charters leave from the eastern and southern coasts, where the water is calmest. The island, also written Zante, sits in the Ionian Sea off western Greece.

  • Zakynthos Town port, the main harbour beside Agios Dionysios, with the widest choice of boats.
  • Porto Roma, a small sheltered cove on the Vasilikos peninsula popular for pickups.
  • Limni Keri, the launch point closest to the Keri Caves and Marathonisi turtle island.
  • Laganas, set on the bay that forms part of the National Marine Park.
  • Agios Nikolaos in the north, the handiest departure for the Blue Caves and Navagio.

Which boat to rent in Zakynthos?

A small self-drive motorboat suits the calm east coast, while a crewed yacht makes sense for Navagio and longer days. Your choice depends on group size, budget and whether anyone holds a licence.

  1. Small motorboat, best for couples exploring nearby coves, seats up to 5, from EUR 120 a day.
  2. RIB or speedboat, best for reaching Navagio quickly, seats up to 8, from EUR 250 a day.
  3. Motor yacht, best for shaded comfort on a full day, seats up to 10; you can study the spec on the Azimut 58 charter page to gauge what a flybridge yacht offers, with day rates from EUR 1,500.
  4. Catamaran, best for stable cruising and swimming stops, seats up to 12, from EUR 900 a day.
  5. Sailing yacht, best for a slower, wind-led day, seats up to 8, from EUR 600 a day.

How is a Zakynthos boat booked and run?

You request your dates with the operator, confirm the boat and skipper, then meet at the agreed port on the day. A marketplace keeps prices, capacity and reviews in one place.

Fuel is usually charged on top, and a refundable deposit is standard on self-drive hires. A skippered day is a sensible default, because a captain knows the Maestro breeze and the safest line into Navagio. Many guests booking day charters in Zakynthos add the Blue Caves, which lie roughly 2 nautical miles east of Cape Skinari.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Zakynthos?

Prices vary with boat size, season and whether a skipper is included, so treat these as planning bands.

  • A shared group tour to Navagio and the Blue Caves typically costs from EUR 30 per person.
  • A small self-drive motorboat for a half-day starts at around EUR 90 in EUR.
  • A catamaran for a full day runs from roughly EUR 900 in EUR.
  • A crewed motor yacht for a full day begins near EUR 1,500 in EUR and rises with size.

When is the season, and do you need a licence in Zakynthos?

High season is July and August, and Greek law decides licensing by engine power, so the operator confirms the exact requirement for each boat. The sailing window runs from May to October, with the busiest weeks in midsummer.

As a rule in Greece, boats with smaller engines can often be rented without a licence, while more powerful craft and yachts require one or a hired skipper. The afternoon Maestro, a north-westerly Ionian breeze, builds after midday, which is why many crews aim for early starts.

Set off before 09:00 to reach Navagio while the cove is calm and the light is best, then turn for sheltered Vasilikos coves once the Maestro picks up in the afternoon.

At a glance

  • Price band: from EUR 120 self-drive to EUR 1,500-plus crewed per day
  • Peak months: July and August
  • Trip length: typically 4 to 8 hours for a day charter
  • Capacity: roughly 5 to 12 guests depending on boat
  • Currency: EUR (Euro)

Questions about boat rental in Zakynthos

Can you visit Navagio Beach by rented boat?

You can reach the bay below Navagio, also called Shipwreck Beach, by boat from the north of the island, and landing access depends on conditions and any local restrictions in the 2026 season.

Is a skipper included with the boat?

A skipper is included on crewed charters and yachts, while smaller self-drive motorboats are hired without one, so check the listing to see whether a captain comes as standard.

How many people fit on a typical charter?

Capacity ranges from about 5 on a small motorboat to roughly 12 on a catamaran, and each listing states its own limit, which is set for safety reasons.

What is the best month to go?

June and September offer warm seas with thinner crowds than the July and August peak, making them a strong choice for a relaxed day on the water.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Zakynthos or list your own, and if you keep a vessel on the island you can become a host to earn from quieter weeks. Compare boats, set your dates and book the day that suits your group best.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Zakynthos and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
topic: a budget guide to renting a boat in Zakynthos
